* ==========================================================================
   1. GLOBAL RESET & APP LOCKDOWN
   ========================================================================== */
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box; /* Ensures padding never adds to width/height */
}

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  width: 100vw;          /* Lock strictly to Viewport Width */
  height: 100vh;         /* Lock strictly to Viewport Height */
  height: 100dvh;        /* Modern iOS dynamic viewport lock */
  overflow: hidden;      /* Aggressive block on root-level scrolling */
  position: fixed;       /* Freezes the native iOS viewport */
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  background: #fdf5f5;
}

#root {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;      /* Keeps the React engine contained */
}

/* ==========================================================================
   2. APP WRAPPER CONTROLS
   ========================================================================== */
.app-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  
  /* Safe-area layout padding */
  padding-top: calc(env(safe-area-inset-top, 20px) + 20px); 
  padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px);
  padding-left: env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px);
  padding-right: env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px);
  
  box-sizing: border-box;
  overflow: hidden;       /* Prevents the wrapper from stretching */
}
